title: Generating a Valid XML Schema
scenario: Create a valid XML schema for a fictional online shopping cart system. The XML schema should include attributes for product name, price, quantity, and a unique identifier. The schema must be self-descriptive and include constraints for valid data types and lengths. Use a specific namespace and ensure the schema is well-formed and easy to understand for developers.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated XML schema is well-formed, valid, and self-descriptive.
Verify that the schema includes constraints for valid data types and lengths (e.g., integer, string, decimal).
Evaluate the readability and maintainability of the schema, including comments and documentation.
